_comment: FEATURE_LIST.json is a QA tracker, NOT a task mirror. Each entry = one user-facing feature. 'passes: true' means the user has MANUALLY VERIFIED the feature works end-to-end. Do NOT flip passes:true just because a task completed — task completion is tracked in TASK_REGISTRY.md. This file answers the question 'what has been QA'd and works?' not 'what has been built?'.

_format.name: Short feature name
_format.notes: Failing case description, linked task IDs, or empty string
